title: Oath of umpire.
doc_html:
Art. 3119.  Oath of umpire.

The umpire shall take an oath similar to that taken by the arbitrators, before examining the matter or the point submitted to him.
doc_text:
Art. 3119.  Oath of umpire.
The umpire shall take an oath similar to that taken by the arbitrators, before examining the matter or the point submitted to him.
